name: Gupt
description: Self-hosted, end-to-end encrypted messenger built on Nostr
compose:
name: slashnode-gupt
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/besoeasy/gupt:2026.06.22
    container_name: gupt
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8423:8000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
